query: The newest Computer Science Datastructures used in healthcare
preprocessed_query: The newest Computer Science Datastructures used in healthcare

steps.name: query_preprocessing
steps.input_query: The newest Computer Science Datastructures used in healthcare
steps.preprocessed_query: The newest Computer Science Datastructures used in healthcare

results.title: Data Science in Healthcare Systems: A Comprehensive Review ... - Springer
results.snippet: This paper reviews the state-of- the -art healthcare data science applications, emphasizing predictive analytics, NLP for unstructured data processing, and big data for public health surveillance. Despite significant progress, data integration, model interpretability, and ethical concerns remain.

results.title: From machine learning to deep learning: Advances of the recent data ...
results.snippet: In this direction, the article illustrated the recent progress of data-driven medical science using ML to DL in two categories: firstly, the recent development of data science in medicine with the use of ML to DL and, secondly, the chabot technologies in healthcare and medicine, particularly on ChatGPT.

results.title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Healthcare Data Processing and ...
results.snippet: Their proposed framework provides a new potential pathway for the cost-effective early detection of Parkinson's Disease in normal healthcare settings. Mudavadkar et al. used ensemble models that mixed different deep learning architectures to improve the performance of AI in detecting gastric cancer.

results.title: Data Science in Healthcare - GeeksforGeeks
results.snippet: Data science , with its toolbox of advanced algorithms and machine learning approaches, has reshaped how we tackle healthcare challenges. The combination of medical expertise and data-driven insights is altering every aspect of healthcare , boosting patient outcomes and healthcare systems.

results.title: New AI system could accelerate clinical research - MIT News
results.snippet: They can use the system for a new segmentation task without retraining the model. In the long run, this tool could accelerate studies of new treatment methods and reduce the cost of clinical trials and medical research.

steps.name: llm_structuring_output

entity_name.source_title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Healthcare Data Processing and Analyzing: Towards Data-Driven Decision-Making and Precise Medicine - PMC Lock
entity_name.evidence: Guo et al. developed two-dimensional (2D) and three-dimensional (3D) no new U-Net (nnU-Net) networks to segment contrast-enhanced computed tomography (CT) images.

entity_type.source_title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Healthcare Data Processing and Analyzing: Towards Data-Driven Decision-Making and Precise Medicine - PMC Lock
entity_type.evidence: nnU-Net architectures enable the automatic segmentation and quantification of aorta for rapid diagnosis, surgical planning, and biomechanical simulation.

description.value: A framework for the automatic segmentation and quantification of morphological features in medical imaging, specifically used for Type A aortic dissection detection.
description.source_title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Healthcare Data Processing and Analyzing: Towards Data-Driven Decision-Making and Precise Medicine - PMC Lock
description.evidence: The nnU-Net architectures showed the potential of the automatic segmentation and quantification of aortic structures for rapid diagnosis, surgical planning, and the subsequent biomechanical simulation of the aorta.

dimensionality.source_title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Healthcare Data Processing and Analyzing: Towards Data-Driven Decision-Making and Precise Medicine - PMC Lock
dimensionality.evidence: Guo et al. developed two-dimensional (2D) and three-dimensional (3D) no new U-Net (nnU-Net) networks.

entity_name.source_title: New AI system could accelerate clinical research | MIT News | Massachusetts Institute of Technology
entity_name.evidence: This new system, MultiverSeg, combines the best of each approach. It predicts a segmentation for a new image based on user interactions, like scribbles, but also keeps each segmented image in a context set.

entity_type.source_title: New AI system could accelerate clinical research | MIT News | Massachusetts Institute of Technology
entity_type.evidence: MIT researchers developed an artificial intelligence-based system that enables a researcher to rapidly segment new biomedical imaging datasets by clicking, scribbling, and drawing boxes on the images.

description.value: An AI model designed for scalable interactive segmentation of biomedical imaging datasets that uses in-context guidance from previously segmented images to improve predictions.
description.source_title: New AI system could accelerate clinical research | MIT News | Massachusetts Institute of Technology
description.evidence: The model can then segment each new image accurately without user input. It can do this because the model’s architecture has been specially designed to use information from images it has already segmented to make new predictions.

architecture_component.source_title: New AI system could accelerate clinical research | MIT News | Massachusetts Institute of Technology
architecture_component.evidence: The researchers designed the model’s architecture to use a context set of any size.

entity_name.source_title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Healthcare Data Processing and Analyzing: Towards Data-Driven Decision-Making and Precise Medicine - PMC Lock
entity_name.evidence: Deep learning models, including a convolutional neural network (CNN), residual network (ResNet), and vision transformer (ViT), were deployed in gait analysis.

entity_type.source_title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Healthcare Data Processing and Analyzing: Towards Data-Driven Decision-Making and Precise Medicine - PMC Lock
entity_type.evidence: Deep learning models, including a convolutional neural network (CNN), residual network (ResNet), and vision transformer (ViT), were deployed in gait analysis based on skeleton energy images (SEIs).

description.value: A deep learning model architecture used for high-accuracy analysis of medical images and gait sequences for disease classification.
description.source_title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Healthcare Data Processing and Analyzing: Towards Data-Driven Decision-Making and Precise Medicine - PMC Lock
description.evidence: Deep learning models... were deployed in gait analysis based on skeleton energy images (SEIs) of gait sequences... 90% accuracy was achieved.

application.source_title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Healthcare Data Processing and Analyzing: Towards Data-Driven Decision-Making and Precise Medicine - PMC Lock
application.evidence: propose an AI framework for the diagnosis and severity classification of Parkinson’s Disease... Deep learning models... vision transformer (ViT).

entity_name.source_title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Healthcare Data Processing and Analyzing: Towards Data-Driven Decision-Making and Precise Medicine - PMC Lock
entity_name.evidence: Deep learning models... were deployed in gait analysis based on skeleton energy images (SEIs) of gait sequences.

entity_type.source_title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Healthcare Data Processing and Analyzing: Towards Data-Driven Decision-Making and Precise Medicine - PMC Lock
entity_type.evidence: deploy in gait analysis based on skeleton energy images (SEIs) of gait sequences... for the diagnosis and severity classification of Parkinson’s Disease.

description.value: A synthesized image format used to represent gait sequence data for analysis by deep learning models in uncontrolled healthcare settings.
description.source_title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Healthcare Data Processing and Analyzing: Towards Data-Driven Decision-Making and Precise Medicine - PMC Lock
description.evidence: Severity Classification of Parkinson’s Disease via Synthesis of Energy Skeleton Images from Videos Produced in Uncontrolled Environments.

data_source.source_title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Healthcare Data Processing and Analyzing: Towards Data-Driven Decision-Making and Precise Medicine - PMC Lock
data_source.evidence: diagnosis and severity classification of Parkinson’s Disease using video data captured in uncontrolled environments.

entity_name.evidence: Deepr: a convolutional net for medical records.

entity_type.evidence: Deepr: a convolutional net for medical records. IEEE J. Biomed. Health Inform. 21 (1), 22–30 (2017).

description.evidence: Deepr: a convolutional net for medical records.
